example: Michael is [diligent] in his studies, so he does very well at school.
麥可在學業上很勤奮，所以他在學校表現得很好。
Emma shows great [diligence] in her work, and her boss often praises her for it.
艾瑪在工作上展現出極大的勤奮，而她的老闆也經常因此稱讚她。
notes: praise sb. for sth. = compliment sb. on sth.: 因某事讚美某人

chinese: adj. 國際的 (relating to more than one nation)
example: English is an [international] language. Many people in different countries use it.
英文是一種國際語言。許多不同國家的人都使用它。
notes: Word Smart: inter- = 在……之間；交互

chinese: adv. 相對地 (in comparison with something similar)
example: Dustin always shops on Amazon because of its [relatively] low prices.
達斯汀總是在亞馬遜購物，因為它的價格相對較低。

chinese: adj. 偏遠的 (far away from other cities)
example: The [remote] village is famous for its unique buildings and traditional costumes.
那座偏遠的村莊以其獨特的建築和傳統服飾聞名。

chinese: vt. 追求 (to try to achieve something)
example: Chris [pursues] his goal of becoming an engineer by studying online in addition to his college courses.
克里斯除了上大學課程外，還透過線上學習來追求成為工程師的目標。

phrases.chinese: 從事某領域或行業的工作

example: Tracy came to the big city in [pursuit] of her dreams.
崔西為了追尋夢想而來到大城市。

chinese: n. [U] 雕刻技藝 (the skill of cutting a shape in a material)
example: The wood [carving] artist is going to display his work at this museum next month.
那位木雕藝術家下個月要在這間博物館展示他的作品。
The ancient people [carved] their homes directly into the mountain to stay cool during the summer and warm during the winter.
古代人直接把住家刻在山中，好讓夏天保持涼爽、冬天保持溫暖。

phrases.chinese: 把 A 刻在 B 上
用 B 雕刻出 A

chinese: n. [C] 錦標賽 (a competition to decide the best player or team)
example: Taiwan's baseball team beat all the other teams and won the international [championship].
台灣的棒球隊打敗了其他所有球隊，贏得了國際錦標賽冠軍。
The two-time World Half Marathon [champion] is expected to win again this year.
這位曾兩度獲得世界半程馬拉松冠軍的選手，今年也被看好再次奪冠。

chinese: vi.; vt. 自願 (to do something without being forced or paid)
example: Sue [volunteered] to take out the garbage when no one else wanted to do it.
當其他人都不想倒垃圾時，蘇自願去做。
The library needs more [volunteers] to help arrange the books.
圖書館需要更多志工來幫忙整理書籍。

chinese: n. [C] 校長 (someone who is in charge of a school)
example: Our [principal], Ms. Lin, has led our school to be the best high school in town.
我們的校長林女士帶領學校成為鎮上最好的高中。

chinese: n. [C][U] 可能性，潛力 (the chance to happen or be successful)
example: Leo is too stubborn. There's no [possibility] of changing his mind.
里歐太固執了，根本沒有改變他想法的可能性。

chinese: vt. 建立 (to start a relationship)
vt. 設立，創辦 (to start an organization)
example: The two companies [established] a business relationship with each other many years ago.
那兩家公司在很多年前就建立了商業合作關係。
This food company was [established] in 1992 but went out of business last month because of COVID-19.
這家食品公司成立於 1992 年，但因為新冠疫情而在上個月倒閉了。

chinese: vt. 實現，達成 (to achieve something)
example: Tony finally [fulfilled] his dream of becoming a Broadway performer after years of effort.
經過多年的努力，東尼終於實現了成為百老匯表演者的夢想。

chinese: adj. 出色的，傑出的 (extremely good)
example: The singer's [outstanding] skill caught the public's attention.
那位歌手出色的技巧吸引了大眾的注意。

chinese: vt. 激起，引起 (to cause someone to have a certain feeling)
example: The sound from outside [aroused] Joanne's curiosity, so she went to the window to see what had happened.
外面的聲音引起了喬安的好奇心，所以她走到窗邊看看發生了什麼事。

chinese: n. [U][C] 熱情 (a strong feeling about something)
example: Charlie loves animals, and he often talks with great [passion] about them.
查理喜歡動物，而且他經常滿懷熱情地談論牠們。
The student gave a [passionate] speech about the importance of study-life balance and concluded by asking the teachers to give them less homework.
那位學生發表了一場充滿熱情的演說，談論讀書與生活平衡的重要性，最後還請老師少給一點作業。

phrases.chinese: 熱情的演說／堅定的信念／熱情的支持

chinese: adj. 相關的，有關聯的 (connected in some way)
example: The doctor said that my poor sleep quality is closely [related] to my illness.
醫生說我的睡眠品質差和我的疾病有密切關係。
It is hard to [relate] Julie's dress to dancing because it's so heavy.
很難把茱莉的洋裝和跳舞聯想在一起，因為它太重了。

phrases.chinese: 把 A 與 B 聯繫起來

notes: It is Greek to me: 太難了，我不會
head (v.) for + 地方: 朝……行進

chinese: phr. 下定決心 (to decide something)
example: Judy finally [made up her mind] to study abroad after high school.
茱蒂終於下定決心要在高中畢業後出國留學。
notes: be determined to V: 下定決心做……
be resolved to V: 下定決心做……

example: [Aside from] owning an Italian restaurant, David also owns a big shopping mall.
除了擁有一間義大利餐廳之外，大衛還擁有一座大型購物商場。

chinese: phr. 開設，創辦 (to start an organization)
example: They [set up] a small tech company in 2020 to develop creative software solutions for local businesses.
他們在 2020 年成立了一間小型科技公司，為當地企業開發有創意的軟體解決方案。
notes: set sb. up: 設計陷害某人

chinese: phr. 尤其，最重要地 (the most important of all)
example: The house is big and beautiful. [Above all], it's close to my office.
那間房子又大又漂亮。最重要的是，它離我的辦公室很近。
notes: most of all: 尤其；最重要地

chinese: phr. 每天，一天到晚 (every day)
example: It is boring for Tony to do the same job in the office [day in and day out].
東尼天天在辦公室做同樣的工作，實在很無聊。
notes: day by day: 一天天地（逐漸地）
day after day: 日復一日（重複動作）

chinese: phr. 儘管 (without being affected by something)
example: [In spite of] the fact that Emily's not so rich, she still gives most of her money to the poor.
儘管艾蜜莉不是很有錢，她仍然把大部分的錢捐給窮人。
notes: although/though/even though + S + V: 雖然……但是……
in spite of / despite + N/V-ing, S + V: 儘管……，仍然……
